(b) above the entry ''(MICRO-!, SMALL-2, MEDIUM-3)", the following entry shall be inserted, namely:- "CATEGORY OF ENTERPRISE": (B) Under the heading "PART I (To be filled in as expression of intent)",- (a) in serial no.6, at page 18, the following shall be deleted, namely:- (b) (i) "(iii) OTHERS In case of others, please specify Under the sub-heading "ACKNOWLEDGEMENT" at page 22,- for the opening' paragraph beginning with "M/s , . , MEMORANDUM" and ending with "l\1EMORANDUM following shall be substituted, namely:- ' "PART-I" D ..
